title: rubus nemoralis f. microphyllus
intro: Rubus nemoralis f. microphyllus, also known as the dwarf woodland raspberry, is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus nemoralis f. microphyllus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and extracts, which can be used to create medicinal products or consumed directly for their health benefits.
